steps.title: Identify the slope
steps.content: The equation $l = 30 + 2w$ is linear. The 2 is the coefficient of $w$, which is the slope of the relationship.

steps.title: Interpret the slope in context
steps.content: The slope tells us the rate of change: for every 1-unit increase in the independent variable, the dependent variable increases by the slope value. Here, for each 1-newton increase in weight, the spring length increases by 2 centimeters. This matches choice D — D is correct.
